name: Only Filtering Special Elements at a Specified Location
description: The product filters special elements only at particular locations (e.g., beginning or end of string, or at a specific byte offset) rather than comprehensively throughout the input. This allows dangerous elements at other positions to bypass the filter.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data that flows through a CONTROL node performing position-specific filtering (only at start, end, or fixed offset) to an EGRESS or TRANSFORM node, leaving special elements at other positions unfiltered.
